properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v4 v6 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When the horizon bleeds into darkness And the whole world falls asleep I ponder my faith and reverence For your word that cuts so deep

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Will I ever be your perfect bride And stand tall with you by my side Oh, I think about all the times I lied It cuts through my heart deep inside

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lead me to the path where you want me to be And walk with you to eternity

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Burn my doubts with my sins you forgave Help me believe you're heeding my prayers I know you're there and your blood still saves Sinner such as I, all my burdens you bear Strengthen this wavering faith of mine Give me patience to wait 'cause I know you're always on time

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Let me be deserving of your love Mold me to be your perfect servant Give me faith from heaven up above Deserving one to hold your hand

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Burn my sins to ash, set my heart ablaze (Purify) Make me more like you, I know I am saved (I'm Redeemed) Let me live your word, not against your will (I'll serve you) Will my heart to wait 'til I'm fully healed (Oh, Patience)
